retrotweaks.tooltip.error: An error occurred that caused this tweak to fail. Please check your logs for more information.
retrotweaks.tooltip.server: This tweak is being set by the server.
retrotweaks.tweak.beta_chat.tooltip: When enabled, the chat will be modified to appear as the one in beta versions.
retrotweaks.tweak.beta_leaves_lighting.t: When enabled, Leaves will no longer cast an Ambient Occlusion shadow on adjacent blocks.
retrotweaks.tweak.beta_main_menu.tooltip: When enabled, the main menu will be modified to look like the one that appears in beta versions.
retrotweaks.tweak.beta_pause_menu.toolti: When enabled, the pause menu will be modified to look like the one that appears in beta versions.
retrotweaks.tweak.big_stars.tooltip:
When enabled, the stars will be ~2x bigger like in Beta.

This tweak requires a restart to take effect.
retrotweaks.tweak.dark_ambient_occlusion: When enabled, the shadows between adjacent blocks will be darker.
retrotweaks.tweak.dark_water_lighting.to: When enabled, Water will block 3 light levels per layer instead of 1.
retrotweaks.tweak.dirt_gui_background.to: When enabled, the panorama will be replaced with a dirt background like in Beta 1.7.3 and before.
retrotweaks.tweak.flat_items.tooltip: When enabled, dropped items will be rendered 2D and flat.
retrotweaks.tweak.full_face_shading.tool: When enabled, the lighting on block models will be applied to each individual element independent of their position in the model.
retrotweaks.tweak.hide_hunger_bar.toolti: When enabled, the game hud will be modified to hide the hunger bar, and move other bars to their original locations.
retrotweaks.tweak.hide_xp_bar.tooltip: When enabled, the experience bar and the level number will be hidden from the hud, with other elements adjusted to match.
retrotweaks.tweak.loading_screen.tooltip: When enabled, the loading screen will appear as the one from the version selected.
retrotweaks.tweak.move_system_messages.t: When enabled, system messages will appear in chat rather than as a overlay
retrotweaks.tweak.old_button_colors.tool: When enabled, menu buttons will use the colors from older versions of the game
retrotweaks.tweak.old_death_screen.toolt: When enabled, the death screen will display no reason of death, and classic Score: &e0 bug will be restored
When enabled, Fences will only connect to Fences and not blocks
retrotweaks.tweak.old_footsteps.tooltip: When enabled, all mobs will make player-like footsteps based on the block they are standing on.
retrotweaks.tweak.old_hitbox_shapes.tool: When enabled, blocks like Fences and Chests will have their old hitboxes.
retrotweaks.tweak.old_panorama_blur.tool: When enabled, the panorama will be rendered blurry
retrotweaks.tweak.old_world_loading_scre: When enabled, the world loading screen will be modified to appear as the one featured in earlier versions of the game.
retrotweaks.tweak.old_crosshair.tooltip: When enabled, the crosshair will appear in the position it did in older versions, along with appearing in third person. Also removes attack indicators
retrotweaks.tweak.unstable_tnt.tooltip: When enabled, TNT will explode immediately when broken in Survival
